mapper.sql: id, order_no, student_id, merchant_id, rider_id, order_status, total_amount, delivery_fee, packing_fee, discount_amount, pay_amount, payment_method, delivery_address, receiver_name, receiver_phone, delivery_time, remark, create_time, payment_time, merchant_accept_time, rider_accept_time, delivery_start_time, delivery_complete_time, cancel_time, cancel_reason, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (order_no, student_id, merchant_id, rider_id, order_status, total_amount, delivery_fee, packing_fee, discount_amount, pay_amount, payment_method, delivery_address, receiver_name, receiver_phone, delivery_time, remark) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{studentId}, #{merchantId}, #{riderId}, #{orderStatus}, #{totalAmount}, #{deliveryFee}, #{packingFee}, #{discountAmount}, #{payAmount}, #{paymentMethod}, #{deliveryAddress}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverPhone}, #{deliveryTime}, #{remark})
